<?php namespace Cviebrock\EloquentSluggable\Tests\Models; /** * Class PostWithCustomSeparator. * * A test model that uses a custom suffix generation method. */ class PostWithCustomSeparator extends Post { /** * Return the sluggable configuration array for this model. */ public function sluggable(): array { return [ 'slug' => [ 'source' => 'title', 'separator' => '.', ], ]; } }
